response.justification: The candidate is a broadly experienced software craftsman with strong testing culture, open-source contributions, and mentoring through workshops, but he misses the role's core minimum qualifications. The job requires 8 years of C++; the resume shows only a brief C++ stint at National Instruments and a thesis project, and C++ does not appear in his skills list. Large-scale infrastructure exposure is limited to roughly two years of high-throughput work at Sociomantic, and he has no formal technical-leadership role owning a cloud or compute platform. He is a strong senior product engineer, but not a fit for a C++-centric cloud compute platform tech lead.
strengths: Decades of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, authored test frameworks, and ran training workshops
Genuine low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (millions of HTTP requests/sec at Sociomantic)
concerns: Falls far short of the required 8 years of C++; C++ is absent from his current skills list
Limited depth in large-scale infrastructure and cloud architecture relative to the 5-year requirement
No formal technical-leadership experience leading or mentoring cloud/DevOps engineering teams

key_factors.factor: Limited cloud platform and distributed-systems depth
